title: rubus × exilipes
intro: Rubus × exilipes, a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus allegheniensis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × exilipes include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and improve cardiovascular health. Rubus × exilipes can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
